/usr/bin/c++  -O2 -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -pipe -fvisibility=hidden  -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sign_license.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/sign_license.dir/tools/sign_license.cpp.o -o sign_license  /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so
